completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: web (React 19.2.4 PWA + TS 5.9.3 + Vite 7.3.1 + Supabase 2.93.3 + Zustand 5.0.11 + Tailwind 4.1.17 + Zod 4.3.6)

Found 220+ existing doc sources: CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, tests/README.md, PRD (11 shards), Architecture (5), UX Design (11), Epics (8), 17 story impl artifacts, 22 test artifacts, 25 TEA docs, 11 CI workflows, 21 SQL migrations, previous docs (95 files in 9 sections)
Tech stack: React 19.2.4, TS 5.9.3, Vite 7.3.1, Zustand 5.0.11, Supabase 2.93.3, Tailwind 4.1.17, Zod 4.3.6, Sentry 10.39.0, Vitest 4.0.17, Playwright 1.58.2

4 parallel agents completed: Agent A (architecture+state+source-tree: 44 files, 5343 lines, fixed IndexedDB indexes/Sentry dep/validation limits), Agent B (api-reference+data-models: 25 files, 3889 lines, 16 RPCs, 21 migrations), Agent C (component-inventory: 9 files, 81 components incl 8 together-mode), Agent D (project-overview+dev-guide+performance: 28 files, 3919 lines, corrected dotenvx→Doppler in 13 files)

Master index.md updated: corrected file count 97, line count ~14,400, component count 81, migration count 21, added Sentry to quick ref, fixed sharded planning artifact links, corrected Doppler references
Validation: No '(To be generated)' markers found. No TBD/TODO/Pending markers found. Checklist reviewed against all sections.
Finalized. 97 markdown files, ~14,400 lines across 9 sections + performance + root
